---
sidebar: false
description: "Graduates of our data science for openwashdata course (2025-2026)"
toc: true
listing:
  date-format: long
  feed: true
  filter-ui: false
  type: table
  table-hover: false
  sort-ui: false
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  fields: [author, github_username, title, public_link, data_package]
  field-display-names:
    author: "Author"
    github_username: "GitHub Username"
    title: "Project Title"
    public_link: "Project Public Link"
    data_package: "Data Package"
  id: graduates-listings
  contents: data/graduates-2026.yml
aliases: ["graduates-2026/"]
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    anchor-sections: true
---

This page highlights the capstone projects completed by the graduates of our [data science for openwashdata course](https://ds4owd-002.github.io/website/) for the 2025-2026 edition. To complete the course, each course participant had to conclude a capstone project with a dataset of their choice and complete a [list of required items](https://ds4owd-002.github.io/website/content/project/#required-items).

Please note that not all projects are publicly available. The GitHub repository is set to "private" without a public website.


::: {graduates-listings}
:::
